CONTENT.Career: Dahan was born in Hatzor HaGlilit and raised in Rosh Pinna.Dahan made his professional debut for Ironi Kiryat Shmona in the Israeli Premier League on 30 November 2019, in the home match against Maccabi Tel Aviv, which finished as a 0–1 loss.
CONTENT.Honours: Maccabi HaifaIsraeli Premier League: 2021–22Toto Cup: 2021–22Israel Super Cup: 2021, 2023Beitar JerusalemIsrael State Cup: 2022–23
CONTENT.Early life: Dahan was born in Hatzor HaGlilit, Israel, to a Sephardic Jewish family.

SUMMARY: Uri Dahan (or Ori, Hebrew: אורי דהן; born (1999-12-07)7 December 1999) is an Israeli footballer who plays as a centre-back for Beitar Jerusalem.
